name: ClankerMails
description: Give your bot a real email address. Read mail, manage inboxes, and process incoming messages through the ClankerMails API.

apiKey.label: ClankerMails API Key
apiKey.help: Your ClankerMails API key. Get one at https://clankermails.com/dashboard/api-keys

baseUrl.label: ClankerMails Base URL
baseUrl.help: Override for self-hosted instances. Defaults to https://clankermails.com.

pollIntervalSeconds.label: Poll interval (seconds)
pollIntervalSeconds.help: How often the background watcher checks for new mail. Default: 60.

debounceSeconds.label: Alert debounce (seconds)
debounceSeconds.help: Minimum time between alerts for the same inbox. Default: 300 (5 minutes).

inboxesToWatch.label: Inboxes to watch
inboxesToWatch.help: List of inbox IDs or addresses to watch. Leave empty or set to "all" to watch every inbox on the account.

webhookSecret.label: Webhook secret
webhookSecret.help: If you point a ClankerMails inbox webhook at this OpenClaw instance, paste the inbox's webhook_secret here for HMAC verification.

webhookPath.label: Webhook path
webhookPath.help: Override the HTTP path that receives ClankerMails webhooks. Defaults to /clankermails/webhook.
